response.justification: Strong foundational engineering with 19 years of diverse technical experience and current AI infrastructure work, but has only recently entered the AI domain (2 months at re:cinq) and lacks the demonstrated AI product expertise or strategic advising background the role requires. The candidate is actively building relevant skills but hasn't yet established the recognized AI leadership position needed for a principal-level role advising on cutting-edge strategy.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year requirement with 19 years across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure systems
Currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks directly aligned with role's AI focus
Demonstrated technical leadership through open-source stewardship, mentoring, and community engagement
concerns: Entered AI/agent infrastructure domain only 2 months ago—lacks demonstrated depth in AI product development
Staff Engineer title, not yet director-level individual contributor the role seeks
No evidence of strategic customer advising, AI platform adoption consulting, or shaping future product roadmaps

key_factors.factor: Broad technical experience and current AI infrastructure work
